name: auto-mode
description: This is the complete source code and the build instructions for **SoundCore-Desktop**, a tiny system-tray app that automatically applies your saved profile — gaming mode, ambient sound mode, equalizer, anything — to a [Soundcore][soundcore] device the moment it connects to your computer. No phone, no official app. Built on the [OpenSCQ30][openscq30] library and its reverse-engineered MTProto-style device protocol over Bluetooth RFCOMM.
